<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">

<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <meta name="myop:size" content='{"width":"100%","height":"100%"}'>
    <title>Myop Playground | Practice vibe-coding inside a mature product</title>
    <meta name="description" content="Describe a component, preview it live, and see how Myop bridges AI-generated components with real production environments.">

    <script type="myop/types">
// =============================================================================
// MYOP COMPONENT TYPE DEFINITIONS
// =============================================================================

/**
 * Data structure passed to myop_init_interface(data)
 */
interface MyopInitData {
    hero: {
        title: string;
        subtitle: string;
        ctaText: string;
        ctaLink: string;
        visual?: string;
    };
    howItWorks: {
        sectionTitle: string;
        flows: Array<{
            id: string;
            name: string;
            icon: string;
            screenshot?: string;
            steps: Array<{
                id: string;
                title: string;
                description: string;
            }>;
        }>;
    };
    audience: {
        sectionTitle: string;
        groups: Array<{
            id: string;
            icon: string;
            title: string;
            description: string;
        }>;
    };
    finalCta: {
        title: string;
        subtitle: string;
        ctaText: string;
        ctaLink: string;
    };
    gallery: {
        sectionTitle: string;
        subtitle: string;
        items: Array<{
            id: string;
            title: string;
            image?: string;
        }>;
    };
}

/**
 * Actions and payloads for myop_cta_handler(action, payload)
 */
interface MyopCtaPayloads {
    'cta-clicked': { section: string; link: string };
    'flow-selected': { flowId: string };
    'gallery-item-clicked': { id: string; title: string };
}

// =============================================================================
// DO NOT EDIT BELOW - Standard Myop type declarations
// =============================================================================

declare function myop_init_interface(): MyopInitData;
declare function myop_init_interface(data: MyopInitData): void;

declare function myop_cta_handler<K extends keyof MyopCtaPayloads>(
    action: K,
    payload: MyopCtaPayloads[K]
): void;
    </script>

    <!-- ABC Favorit Light font -->
    <style>
        @font-face {
            font-family: 'ABC Favorit Light';
            src: url('./fonts/ABCFavorit-Light.woff2') format('woff2'),
                 url('./fonts/ABCFavorit-Light.woff') format('woff');
            font-weight: 300;
            font-style: normal;
            font-display: swap;
        }
    </style>
    <style>
        :root {
            --text-color: #18181b;
            --text-secondary: #52525b;
            --accent: #9747FF;
            --accent-light: #F3EBFF;
            --accent-hover: #E5D4FF;
            --border-color: #e5e5e5;
            --bg-subtle: #fafafa;
            --purple-5: #F0E8FF;
            --purple-10: #DECCFF;
            --grey-20: #D3D1D5;
            --white: #FFF;
            --bg-color: #ffffff;
            --panel-bg: #fafafa;
            --accent-blue: #9A70DF;
            --accent-green: #10b981;
            --hover-bg: #f4f4f5;
        }

        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        html, body {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            overflow-x: hidden;
        }

        body {
            font-family: "ABC Favorit Light", "ABC Favorit Light Placeholder", sans-serif;
            background: #fff;
            color: var(--text-color);
            font-size: 16px;
            line-height: 1.5;
            -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
            -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
        }

        #app-root {
            width: 100%;
            min-height: 100%;
        }

        /* Animations */
        @keyframes fadeInUp {
            from {
                opacity: 0;
                transform: translateY(20px);
            }
            to {
                opacity: 1;
                transform: translateY(0);
            }
        }

        /* Word-by-word blur reveal */
        .word {
            display: inline-block;
            opacity: 0;
            filter: blur(10px);
            transform: translateY(10px);
            transition: opacity 0.5s ease, filter 0.5s ease, transform 0.5s ease;
        }

        .word.revealed {
            opacity: 1;
            filter: blur(0);
            transform: translateY(0);
        }

        .word-space {
            display: inline;
        }

        /* ========================================
           SECTION 1: HERO (Fullscreen)
           ======================================== */
        .hero {
            height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            text-align: center;
            padding: 2rem;
            position: relative;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgb(250, 248, 255) 0%, rgb(255, 249, 245) 50%, rgb(248, 245, 255) 100%);
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .hero .floating-dot {
            position: absolute;
            width: 200px;
            height: 200px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(151, 71, 255, 0.15) 0%, transparent 70%);
            pointer-events: none;
            z-index: 0;
            left: 10%;
            animation: bounce1 4s ease-in-out infinite;
        }

        .hero .floating-dot:nth-child(2) {
            width: 150px;
            height: 150px;
            left: 75%;
            background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(255, 140, 90, 0.15) 0%, transparent 70%);
            animation: bounce2 3.5s ease-in-out infinite 0.3s;
        }

        .hero .floating-dot:nth-child(3) {
            width: 180px;
            height: 180px;
            left: 40%;
            background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(151, 71, 255, 0.12) 0%, transparent 70%);
            animation: bounce3 4.5s ease-in-out infinite 0.6s;
        }

        .hero .floating-dot:nth-child(4) {
            width: 220px;
            height: 220px;
            left: 60%;
            background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(151, 71, 255, 0.3) 0%, rgba(151, 71, 255, 0) 70%);
            animation: bounce4 3.8s ease-in-out infinite 0.15s;
        }

        .hero .floating-dot:nth-child(5) {
            width: 160px;
            height: 160px;
            left: -5%;
            background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(255, 140, 90, 0.3) 0%, rgba(255, 140, 90, 0) 70%);
            animation: bounce5 4.2s ease-in-out infinite 0.45s;
        }

        /* Continuous bouncing - starts and ends at bottom so loop is seamless */
        @keyframes bounce1 {
            0%, 100% { top: 75%; transform: scale(1.15, 0.85); animation-timing-function: ease-out; }
            50% { top: 5%; transform: scale(0.9, 1.1); animation-timing-function: ease-in; }
        }

        @keyframes bounce2 {
            0%, 100% { top: 72%; transform: scale(1.18, 0.82); animation-timing-function: ease-out; }
            50% { top: 10%; transform: scale(0.88, 1.12); animation-timing-function: ease-in; }
        }

        @keyframes bounce3 {
            0%, 100% { top: 74%; transform: scale(1.2, 0.8); animation-timing-function: ease-out; }
            50% { top: -5%; transform: scale(0.85, 1.15); animation-timing-function: ease-in; }
        }

        @keyframes bounce4 {
            0%, 100% { top: 78%; transform: scale(1.22, 0.78); animation-timing-function: ease-out; }
            50% { top: 15%; transform: scale(0.9, 1.1); animation-timing-function: ease-in; }
        }

        @keyframes bounce5 {
            0%, 100% { top: 70%; transform: scale(1.16, 0.84); animation-timing-function: ease-out; }
            50% { top: 0%; transform: scale(0.88, 1.12); animation-timing-function: ease-in; }
        }

        .hero > *:not(.floating-dot) {
            position: relative;
            z-index: 1;
        }

        .hero-thicker {
            font-size: 13px;
            font-weight: 300;
            letter-spacing: 0.5px;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            margin-bottom: 16px;
            opacity: 0;
            animation: fadeInUp 0.8s ease-out 0.2s forwards;
        }

        .hero h1 {
            font-size: clamp(48px, 8vw, 72px);
            font-weight: 300;
            letter-spacing: -2px;
            line-height: 1.1;
            margin-bottom: 24px;
            color: var(--text-color);
        }

        .hero p {
            font-size: 20px;
            font-weight: 300;
            color: #000;
            max-width: 560px;
            margin-bottom: 48px;
            line-height: 1.5;
            opacity: 0;
            animation: fadeInUp 0.8s ease-out 0.6s forwards;
        }

        .hero-cta {
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            gap: 8px;
            padding: 0 24px;
            height: 41px;
            background: #3E3D3E;
            color: #fff;
            border: 1px solid #3E3D3E;
            border-radius: 6px;
            font-size: 13px;
            font-weight: 500;
            text-decoration: none;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
            opacity: 0;
            animation: fadeInUp 0.8s ease-out 0.8s forwards;
        }

        .hero-cta:hover {
            background: #9747FF;
            border-color: #9747FF;
        }

        .hero-cta svg {
            width: 14px;
            height: 14px;
        }

        .hero-cta--light {
            background: #fff;
            color: var(--text-color);
            border: 1px solid #D3D1D5;
        }

        .hero-cta--light:hover {
            background: #F0E8FF;
            border-color: #DECCFF;
        }

        .final-cta .hero-cta {
            animation: none;
            opacity: 1;
        }

        /* ========================================
           WHAT IS PLAYGROUND SECTION
           ======================================== */
        .what {
            padding: 96px 32px 80px;
            max-width: 1100px;
            margin: 0 auto;
        }
        .what-top {
            max-width: 700px;
            margin-bottom: 64px;
        }
        .what-top h2 {
            font-size: 48px;
            font-weight: 300;
            line-height: 1.15;
            letter-spacing: -0.02em;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        .what-top p {
            font-size: 18px;
            font-weight: 300;
            line-height: 1.7;
            color: #000;
        }
        .what-top p + p {
            margin-top: 10px;
        }
        .what-top strong {
            font-weight: 500;
            color: var(--text-color);
        }

        /* Steps row */
        .steps-row {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
            gap: 0;
        }
        .step-card {
            padding: 28px 24px;
            position: relative;
            transition: background 0.3s;
            cursor: default;
        }
        .step-card::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            opacity: 0;
            transition: opacity 0.3s;
            background: linear-gradient(86deg, rgba(240,232,255,0.4) -6%, rgba(255,255,255,0.4) 77%, rgba(255,237,231,0.4) 96%), #fff;
        }
        .step-card:hover::before {
            opacity: 1;
        }
        .step-num {
            font-family: monospace;
            font-size: 11px;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            margin-bottom: 16px;
            position: relative;
            z-index: 1;
        }
        .step-icon {
            width: 36px;
            height: 36px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            background: rgba(151, 71, 255, 0.1);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            margin-bottom: 16px;
            position: relative;
            z-index: 1;
            transition: background 0.3s, box-shadow 0.3s;
        }
        .step-card:hover .step-icon {
            background: white;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(151,71,255,0.15);
        }
        .step-icon svg {
            width: 16px;
            height: 16px;
        }
        .step-h {
            font-size: 18px;
            font-weight: 600;
            color: var(--text-color);
            margin-bottom: 8px;
            position: relative;
            z-index: 1;
        }
        .step-p {
            font-size: 16px;
            font-weight: 300;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            line-height: 1.55;
            position: relative;
            z-index: 1;
        }
        .step-pill {
            display: inline-block;
            margin-top: 14px;
            font-family: monospace;
            font-size: 10px;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            border-radius: 12px;
            padding: 3px 9px;
            position: relative;
            z-index: 1;
            background: white;
        }


        /* ========================================
           EXTENSION SECTION - How to use it
           ======================================== */
        .extension-section {
            padding: 80px 32px;
            background: white;
        }
        .extension-inner { max-width: 1100px; margin: 0 auto; }

        /* Header */
        .extension-header {
            text-align: center; margin-bottom: 72px;
        }
        .extension-section .section-label {
            font-family: monospace; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.1em;
            text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--text-secondary);
            margin-bottom: 12px;
            display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 12px;
        }
        .extension-section .section-label::after { content: ''; width: 40px; height: 1px; background: var(--border-color); }
        .extension-header h2 {
            font-size: 48px;
            font-weight: 300; letter-spacing: -0.02em; line-height: 1.15;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            max-width: 750px;
            margin-left: auto;
            margin-right: auto;
        }
        .extension-header p {
            font-size: 18px; font-weight: 300; color: #000;
            max-width: 600px;
            margin-left: auto;
            margin-right: auto;
        }

        /* 3-Column Layout */
        .extension-layout {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr 380px 1fr;
            gap: 0;
            align-items: start;
        }

        /* Annotation columns - fixed positions relative to card elements */
        .ext-left  {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 56px;
            /* Offset to align with options area (header ~60px + section-label ~40px + some padding) */
            padding-top: 95px;
        }
        .ext-right {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 56px;
            /* Align first annotation with Preview live button */
            padding-top: 25px;
        }

        .ext-annotation {
            display: flex;
            align-items: flex-start;
        }

        /* LEFT: text on left, line, dot flush against card */
        .ext-left .ext-annotation {
            flex-direction: row;
            text-align: right;
            justify-content: flex-end;
        }

        /* RIGHT: dot flush against card, line, text */
        .ext-right .ext-annotation {
            flex-direction: row;
            text-align: left;
        }

        /* The dot */
        .ext-annotation-dot {
            width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 50%;
            background: var(--accent-light);
            border: 2px solid var(--accent);
            flex-shrink: 0;
            margin-top: 4px;
            z-index: 2;
        }

        /* The connecting line */
        .ext-annotation-line {
            flex-shrink: 0;
            width: 32px; height: 1px;
            margin-top: 9px;
        }
        .ext-right .ext-annotation-line {
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--accent), rgba(151,71,255,0.15));
        }
        .ext-left .ext-annotation-line {
            background: linear-gradient(270deg, var(--accent), rgba(151,71,255,0.15));
        }

        /* Text block */
        .ext-annotation-text { }
        .ext-right .ext-annotation-text { padding-left: 12px; }
        .ext-left .ext-annotation-text  { padding-right: 12px; order: -1; }

        .ext-label { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--accent); margin-bottom: 5px; }
        .ext-desc  { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 300; color: var(--text-secondary); line-height: 1.55; }

        /* Align second left annotation with "Select a task" label */
        .ext-left .ext-annotation:nth-child(2) {
            margin-top: 50px;
        }

        /* Center Card */
        .ext-ui-card {
            border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            border-radius: 16px;
            overflow: hidden;
            box-shadow: 0 8px 48px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
            background: white;
        }

        /* Playground header */
        .ext-pg-header {
            display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 12px;
            padding: 16px 18px;
            padding-top: 21px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,140,90,0.08) 0%, rgba(151,71,255,0.08) 100%);
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        }
        .ext-pg-icon { flex-shrink: 0; }
        .ext-pg-title { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 3px; }
        .ext-pg-sub   { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 300; color: var(--text-secondary); line-height: 1.45; }
        .ext-pg-header-content { flex: 1; }
        .ext-pg-preview-btn {
            background: #6A696A;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 8px;
            padding: 8px 16px;
            font-size: 13px;
            font-weight: 500;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: background 0.2s;
            white-space: nowrap;
        }
        .ext-pg-preview-btn:hover {
            background: #7A797A;
        }

        /* Section label inside card */
        .ext-pg-section-label {
            font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-color);
            padding: 14px 18px 8px;
        }

        /* Options */
        .ext-pg-options { display: flex; gap: 8px; padding: 0 18px 16px; }
        .ext-pg-option {
            flex: 1; border: 1px solid var(--border-color); border-radius: 10px;
            padding: 14px 12px; display: flex; flex-direction: column;
            align-items: flex-start; gap: 8px; cursor: pointer;
            background: white; transition: border-color 0.2s;
        }
        .ext-pg-option:hover { border-color: var(--accent); }
        .ext-pg-option-active { border-color: var(--accent); background: rgba(151,71,255,0.02); }
        .ext-pg-opt-icon { position: relative; }
        .opt-sparkle { position: absolute; top: -3px; right: -5px; font-size: 9px; color: var(--accent); }
        .ext-pg-opt-name { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-color); }
        .ext-pg-opt-badge {
            font-size: 10px; color: var(--text-secondary);
            border: 1px solid var(--border-color); border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 1px 8px; background: white;
        }

        /* Tasks - Redesign with Prompt style (cards with more padding) */
        .ext-pg-tasks { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; padding: 0 18px 18px; }
        .ext-pg-task {
            border: 1px solid var(--border-color); border-radius: 12px;
            padding: 20px; background: white; cursor: pointer;
            transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
        }
        .ext-pg-task:hover { border-color: rgba(151,71,255,0.4); box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(151,71,255,0.08); }
        .ext-pg-task-name { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-color); margin-bottom: 6px; }
        .ext-pg-task-desc { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 300; color: var(--text-secondary); line-height: 1.5; }

        /* Tasks section label */
        .ext-pg-tasks-label {
            text-transform: uppercase;
            font-size: 11px;
            letter-spacing: 0.1em;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            padding: 16px 18px 12px;
            font-weight: 500;
        }

        /* Responsive */
        @media (max-width: 900px) {
            .extension-layout { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
            .ext-left, .ext-right { display: none; }
        }
        @media (max-width: 600px) {
            .extension-section { padding: 60px 20px; }
        }

        /* Section title animation classes */
        .how-it-works-title .word,
        .audience h2 .word,
        .final-cta h2 .word,
        .gallery h2 .word {
            display: inline-block;
            opacity: 0;
            filter: blur(10px);
            transform: translateY(10px);
            transition: opacity 0.5s ease, filter 0.5s ease, transform 0.5s ease;
        }

        .how-it-works-title .word.revealed,
        .audience h2 .word.revealed,
        .final-cta h2 .word.revealed,
        .gallery h2 .word.revealed {
            opacity: 1;
            filter: blur(0);
            transform: translateY(0);
        }

        /* ========================================
           SECTION 2: HOW IT WORKS - Vertical Timeline
           ======================================== */
        .how-it-works-wrapper {
            background: linear-gradient(180deg,
                rgba(255, 255, 255, 1) 0%,
                rgba(151, 71, 255, 0.08) 30%,
                rgba(151, 71, 255, 0.1) 70%,
                rgba(255, 212, 186, 0.12) 100%);
            padding: 80px 0;
        }

        .how-it-works-title {
            font-size: 48px;
            font-weight: 300;
            line-height: 72px;
            letter-spacing: -0.96px;
            color: var(--text-color);
            text-align: center;
            margin-bottom: 48px;
        }

        /* Flow Tabs */
        .flow-tabs {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            gap: 8px;
            margin-bottom: 48px;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            padding: 0 20px;
            position: relative;
        }

        /* Sliding indicator background */
        .flow-tab-indicator {
            position: absolute;
            background: var(--accent);
            border-radius: 100px;
            transition: left 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1),
                        top 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1),
                        width 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1),
                        height 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
            pointer-events: none;
            z-index: 0;
        }

        .flow-tab-indicator.no-transition {
            transition: none;
        }

        .flow-tab-mobile-title {
            display: none;
        }

        .flow-tab {
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
            padding: 10px 20px;
            background: transparent;
            border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            border-radius: 100px;
            font-size: 14px;
            font-weight: 500;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: color 0.3s ease, border-color 0.3s ease;
            position: relative;
            z-index: 1;
        }

        .flow-tab:hover {
            border-color: var(--accent-hover);
            color: var(--text-color);
        }

        .flow-tab.active {
            border-color: var(--accent);
            color: #fff;
        }

        .flow-tab svg {
            width: 18px;
            height: 18px;
            transition: color 0.3s ease;
        }

        .flow-tab.active svg {
            color: #fff;
        }

        /* Flow Content */
        .flow-content {
            display: none;
        }

        .flow-content.active {
            display: block;
        }

        .how-it-works {
            padding: 0;
            max-width: 1100px;
            margin: 0 auto;
        }

        .how-it-works-layout {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
            gap: 20px;
            align-items: start;
        }

        @media (max-width: 800px) {
            .how-it-works-layout {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
                gap: 40px;
            }
        }

        .flow-screenshot {
            position: sticky;
            top: 100px;
            border-radius: 16px;
            overflow: hidden;
            background: #f5f5f5;
            width: 100%;
            margin-left: -20px;
        }

        .flow-screenshot-element {
            width: 130%;
            height: auto;
            display: block;
        }

        .flow-screenshot-placeholder {
            width: 100%;
            aspect-ratio: 16/9;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            font-size: 14px;
            font-weight: 400;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f5f5f5 0%, #e8e8e8 100%);
            border: 1px dashed #d0d0d0;
        }

        .timeline {
            position: relative;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 0;
        }

        /* The vertical line */
        .timeline::before {
            display: none;
        }

        .timeline-step {
            position: relative;
            padding-left: 56px;
            padding-bottom: 80px;
        }

        .timeline-step:last-child {
            padding-bottom: 0;
        }

        /* The node on the line */
        .timeline-node {
            display: none;
        }

        .timeline-step {
            padding-left: 0;
        }
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            font-size: 12px;
            font-weight: 600;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            z-index: 1;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
        }

        .timeline-step.in-view .timeline-node {
            background: var(--accent);
            border-color: var(--accent);
            color: #fff;
        }

        .timeline-step-label {
            font-size: 12px;
            font-weight: 600;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.1em;
            color: var(--accent);
            margin-bottom: 8px;
            display: block;
        }

        .timeline-step h3 {
            font-size: 28px;
            font-weight: 300;
            letter-spacing: -0.3px;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            max-width: 520px;
            color: var(--text-color);
        }

        .timeline-step p {
            font-size: 16px;
            font-weight: 300;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            line-height: 1.6;
            max-width: 600px;
            margin-bottom: 24px;
        }

        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .timeline-step {
                padding-left: 0;
                padding-bottom: 40px;
            }

            .timeline-step h3 {
                font-size: 20px;
            }
        }

        /* ========================================
           SECTION 3: WHO IT'S FOR
           ======================================== */
        .audience {
            padding: 120px 20px;
            max-width: 1100px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            background: radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 50% at 50% 50%, #F7F0FE 0%, transparent 70%);
        }

        .audience h2 {
            font-size: 48px;
            font-weight: 300;
            line-height: 72px;
            letter-spacing: -0.96px;
            color: var(--text-color);
            text-align: center;
            margin-bottom: 48px;
        }

        .audience-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
            gap: 32px;
        }

        .audience-card {
            padding: 32px;
            border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            border-radius: 12px;
            background: #fff;
            transition: transform 0.1s ease-out, box-shadow 0.3s ease, border-color 0.3s ease;
            will-change: transform;
            text-align: left;
        }

        .audience-icon {
            width: 24px;
            height: 24px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            color: var(--text-color);
        }

        .audience-icon svg {
            width: 24px;
            height: 24px;
        }

        .audience-card h3 {
            font-size: 18px;
            font-weight: 500;
            color: var(--text-color);
            margin-bottom: 8px;
        }

        .audience-card p {
            font-size: 15px;
            font-weight: 300;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            line-height: 1.6;
        }

        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .audience-grid {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
                gap: 16px;
            }
        }

        /* Responsive styles for What is Playground & Your Tools */
        @media (max-width: 900px) {
            .steps-row {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
            }
        }

        @media (max-width: 600px) {
            .steps-row {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }

        /* What section mobile styles */
        @media (max-width: 768px) {

            .what-top p {

        /* ========================================
           SECTION 4: FINAL CTA
           ======================================== */
        .final-cta {
            padding: 120px 20px;
            text-align: center;
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .final-cta::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            width: 800px;
            height: 300px;
            background: radial-gradient(ellipse at top,
                rgba(255, 182, 193, 0.3) 0%,
                rgba(221, 160, 221, 0.25) 30%,
                rgba(173, 216, 230, 0.15) 60%,
                transparent 80%);
            border-radius: 0 0 50% 50%;
            pointer-events: none;
            z-index: 0;
        }

        .final-cta > * {
            position: relative;
            z-index: 1;
        }

        .final-cta h2 {
            font-size: clamp(32px, 5vw, 48px);
            font-weight: 300;
            line-height: 72px;
            letter-spacing: -0.96px;
            margin-bottom: 48px;
            color: var(--text-color);
            text-align: center;
        }

        .final-cta p {
            font-size: 18px;
            font-weight: 300;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            margin-bottom: 32px;
        }

        /* ========================================
           SECTION 5: GALLERY - CSS 3D Curved Carousel
           ======================================== */
        .gallery {
            padding: 80px 0;
            margin: 0 auto;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .gallery h2 {
            font-size: 48px;
            font-weight: 300;
            line-height: 72px;
            letter-spacing: -0.96px;
            color: var(--text-color);
            text-align: center;
            margin-bottom: 16px;
            padding: 0 20px;
        }

        .gallery-subtitle {
            font-size: 16px;
            font-weight: 300;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            text-align: center;
            margin-bottom: 48px;
        }

        .gallery-carousel {
            width: 100%;
            height: 320px;
            position: relative;
            perspective: 1000px;
            cursor: grab;
            user-select: none;
        }

        .gallery-carousel:active {
            cursor: grabbing;
        }

        .gallery-track {
            position: absolute;
            top: 50%;
            left: 50%;
            transform-style: preserve-3d;
            transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);
            transition: transform 0.1s ease-out;
        }

        .gallery-card {
            position: absolute;
            width: 600px;
            height: 340px;
            left: -300px;

            border-radius: 12px;
            overflow: hidden;
            background: #d8d8d8;

            border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);

        .gallery-card img {

            height: 100%;

        .gallery-card-placeholder {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;

            /* How it works mobile */

            /* Audience section mobile */

            }

            .final-cta {

            /* Gallery mobile - horizontal scroll grid */

            }

            .gallery-subtitle {

        /* ========== NAVIGATION ========== */
        nav {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            z-index: 100;
            padding: 15px 3rem;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8);
            backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
            transition: transform 0.3s ease-in-out;
            height: 64px;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        nav.nav-hidden {
            transform: translateY(-100%);
        }

        .nav-left {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 44px;
        }

        .logo {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            margin-left: -10px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: opacity 0.2s ease;
            text-decoration: none;

        .logo svg {

            width: auto;
        }

        .logo svg .logo-icon {
            transition: fill 0.2s ease;
        }

        @media (hover: hover) {
            .logo:hover svg .logo-icon {
                fill: url(#logo-hover-gradient);
            }
        }

        .nav-links-left {
            display: flex;
            gap: 44px;
            align-items: center;
        }

        .nav-links-center {
            position: absolute;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            display: flex;
            gap: 38px;
            align-items: center;
        }

        .nav-links-right {
            display: flex;
            gap: 2rem;
            align-items: center;
        }

        .nav-links {
            display: flex;
            gap: 2rem;
            align-items: center;
        }

            padding: 8px 16px;

            padding: 0;

        .nav-dropdown.open .nav-dropdown-chevron {

            display: flex;
        }

        .mobile-rich-item {
            display: flex;
            align-items: flex-start;
            gap: 12px;
            padding: 12px 1rem;
            border-radius: 10px;
            text-decoration: none;
            color: var(--text-color);
            transition: background 0.15s ease;
        }

        .mobile-rich-item:hover {
            background: var(--purple-5);
        }

        .mobile-rich-icon {
            width: 40px;
            height: 40px;
            min-width: 40px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            background: transparent;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
        }

        .mobile-rich-icon svg {
            width: 40px;
            height: 40px;
        }

        .mobile-rich-content {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 2px;
            padding-top: 2px;
        }

        .mobile-rich-title {
            font-size: 15px;
            font-weight: 400;
            color: var(--text-color);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
        }

        .mobile-rich-desc {
            font-size: 13px;
            color: #71717a;
            line-height: 1.35;
            font-weight: 300;
        }

        .mobile-community-icons {
            display: flex;
            gap: 6px;
            margin-top: 4px;
        }

        /* ========== Sign-in Modal ========== */
        .signin-modal-overlay {
            display: none;
            position: fixed;
            inset: 0;
            background: rgba(0,0,0,0.45);
            z-index: 9999;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
        }
        .signin-modal-overlay.open {
            display: flex;
        }
        .signin-card {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 48px 40px;
            gap: 20px;
            width: 376px;
            background: #FFFFFF;
            border-radius: 16px;
            position: relative;
            font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;
            -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
        }
        .signin-title-row {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: row;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 0 0 8px;
            gap: 10px;
            width: 296px;
            align-self: stretch;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }
        .signin-btn-social {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: row;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 12px 16px;
            gap: 8px;
            width: 296px;
            height: 48px;
            background: #FFFFFF;
            border: 1px solid #D3D1D5;
            border-radius: 6px;
            cursor: pointer;
            align-self: stretch;
            font-family: inherit;
            font-weight: 400;
            font-size: 16px;
            line-height: 24px;
            color: #0A090A;
            transition: background 0.15s;
        }
        .signin-btn-social:hover { background: #f5f5f5; }
        .signin-google-icon { width: 20px; height: 20px; flex-shrink: 0; }
        .signin-divider {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: row;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 0;
            gap: 12px;
            width: 296px;
            align-self: stretch;
        }
        .signin-divider-line { flex-grow: 1; height: 0; border-top: 1px solid #B6B5B7; }
        .signin-divider-text { font-weight: 400; font-size: 16px; line-height: 24px; color: #B6B5B7; }
        .signin-btn-email {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: row;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 12px 16px;
            gap: 8px;
            width: 296px;
            height: 48px;
            background: #FFFFFF;
            border: 1px solid #D3D1D5;
            border-radius: 6px;
            cursor: pointer;
            align-self: stretch;
            font-family: inherit;
            font-weight: 400;
            font-size: 16px;
            line-height: 24px;
            color: #0A090A;
            transition: background 0.15s;
        }
        .signin-btn-email:hover { background: #f5f5f5; }
        .signin-terms-text {
            color: #3E3D3E;
            font-size: 11px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 16px;
            letter-spacing: -0.11px;
            text-align: center;
            align-self: stretch;
        }
        .signin-terms-link { color: inherit; text-decoration: underline; }
        .signin-terms-link:hover { color: #6C18FF; text-decoration: underline; }
        .signin-close-btn {
            position: absolute;
            top: 14px;
            right: 14px;
            background: none;
            border: none;
            cursor: pointer;
            color: #999;
            font-size: 16px;
            line-height: 1;
            padding: 4px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            border-radius: 4px;
        }
        .signin-close-btn:hover { color: #333; }

        @media (max-width: 480px) {
            .signin-card { width: calc(100vw - 32px); padding: 40px 24px; }
            .signin-title-row, .signin-btn-social, .signin-divider, .signin-btn-email { width: 100%; }
        }

        /* ========== FOOTER ========== */
        .footer-wrapper {
            background: white;
            width: 100%;
            position: relative;
            z-index: 1;
            margin-bottom: 0;
            padding-bottom: 0;
        }

        .footer-container {
            max-width: 1440px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            padding: 40px 24px;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        .footer-content {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr));
            gap: 20px;
            margin-bottom: 40px;
            margin-top: 40px;
        }

        .footer-column {
            margin-left: 125px;
        }

        .footer-column h3 {
            font-size: 16px;
            font-weight: 400;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            color: #0A090A;
            font-family: "ABC Favorit Light", "ABC Favorit Light Placeholder", sans-serif;
            font-style: normal;
            line-height: 24px;
        }

        .footer-column ul {
            list-style: none;
            padding: 0;
        }

        .footer-column ul li a {
            color: #0A090A;
            font-family: "ABC Favorit Light", "ABC Favorit Light Placeholder", sans-serif;
            font-size: 14px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 24px;
            text-decoration: none;
            cursor: pointer;
        }

        .footer-column ul li a:hover {
            color: #1a1a1a;
            text-decoration: underline;
        }

        .footer-bottom {
            text-align: center;
        }

        .footer-bottom p {
            color: #0A090A;
            text-align: center;
            font-family: "ABC Favorit Light", "ABC Favorit Light Placeholder", sans-serif;
            font-size: 12px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 24px;
        }

        /* ========== RESPONSIVE: Nav Mobile (max-width: 905px) ========== */
        @media (max-width: 905px) {
            nav {
                padding: 15px 1.5rem;
                height: 64px;
            }

            .logo {
                -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
            }

            .logo:active {
                opacity: 0.6;
                background: transparent;
            }

            .nav-links-left,
            .nav-links-center,
            .nav-links-right,
            .nav-links {
                display: none;
            }

            .hamburger {
                display: block;
            }
        }

        @media (min-width: 906px) {
            .mobile-menu {
                display: none;
            }
        }

        /* ========== RESPONSIVE: Mobile Footer (max-width: 768px) ========== */
        @media screen and (max-width: 768px) {
            .footer-container {
                padding: 20px 20px 40px;
            }

            .footer-content {
                display: grid;
                grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
                gap: 20px;
                margin-bottom: 24px;
                margin-top: 24px;
            }

            .footer-column {
                margin-left: 0;
                margin-bottom: 24px;
            }

            .footer-column:last-child {
                margin-bottom: 0;
            }

            .footer-column h3 {
                font-size: 14px;
                margin-bottom: 16px;
                line-height: 20px;
            }

            .footer-column ul li a {
                font-size: 12px;
                line-height: 20px;
            }

            .footer-column ul li {
                margin-bottom: 12px;
            }

            .footer-bottom p {
                font-size: 11px;
                line-height: 20px;
            }
        }

        /* ========== iOS TOUCH FIX ========== */
        @media (hover: none) {
            .nav-link:hover { color: inherit; }
            .nav-link-discord:hover svg path { fill: inherit; }
            .nav-link-demo:hover {
                background: none;
                -webkit-background-clip: initial;
                -webkit-text-fill-color: initial;
                background-clip: initial;
            }
            .nav-cta:hover { background: #ffffff; color: var(--text-color); }
            .nav-dropdown-trigger:hover { color: inherit; }
            .nav-dropdown-item:hover { background: transparent; }
            .mobile-link:hover { background: transparent; }
            .mobile-cta:hover {
                background: linear-gradient(234deg, #FFE3D6 3.79%, #EEEBFF 70.67%);
                color: var(--text-color);
            }
            .mobile-dropdown-trigger:hover { background: transparent; }
            .mobile-dropdown-item:hover { background: transparent; }
            .footer-column ul li a:hover { color: inherit; }
        }
    </style>
</head>

        function attachEventListeners() {
            var appRoot = document.getElementById('app-root');

            appRoot.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                var target = e.target.closest('[data-action]');
                if (target) {
                    var action = target.getAttribute('data-action');
                    var payload = {};

                    if (action === 'cta-clicked') {
                        var link = target.getAttribute('data-link');
                        payload = {
                            section: target.getAttribute('data-section'),
                            link: link
                        };
                        // Open the link
                        if (link) {
                            window.open(link, '_blank');
                        }
                    } else if (action === 'gallery-item-clicked') {
                        payload = {
                            id: target.getAttribute('data-id'),
                            title: target.getAttribute('data-title')
                        };
                    }

                    window.myop_cta_handler(action, payload);
                }

                // Playground option switching
                var optionTarget = e.target.closest('[data-option]');
                if (optionTarget) {
                    var optionId = optionTarget.getAttribute('data-option');

                    // Update active option
                    var allOptions = document.querySelectorAll('.ext-pg-option');
                    allOptions.forEach(function(opt) { opt.classList.remove('ext-pg-option-active'); });
                    optionTarget.classList.add('ext-pg-option-active');

                    // Show corresponding tasks
                    var allTasks = document.querySelectorAll('.ext-pg-tasks');
                    allTasks.forEach(function(tasks) {
                        if (tasks.getAttribute('data-tasks') === optionId) {
                            tasks.style.display = 'flex';
                        } else {
                            tasks.style.display = 'none';
                        }
                    });
                }
            });

            // Flow tabs switching with sliding indicator
            var flowTabs = document.querySelectorAll('.flow-tab');
            var flowTabsContainer = document.querySelector('.flow-tabs');

            var indicator = document.getElementById('flow-tab-indicator');

            // Function to move the sliding indicator
            function moveIndicator(activeTab, instant) {
                if (!activeTab || !flowTabsContainer || !indicator) return;

                var containerRect = flowTabsContainer.getBoundingClientRect();
                var tabRect = activeTab.getBoundingClientRect();

                var left = tabRect.left - containerRect.left;
                var top = tabRect.top - containerRect.top;

                if (instant) {
                    indicator.classList.add('no-transition');
                }

                indicator.style.left = left + 'px';
                indicator.style.top = top + 'px';
                indicator.style.width = tabRect.width + 'px';
                indicator.style.height = tabRect.height + 'px';

                if (instant) {
                    // Force reflow then re-enable transitions
                    indicator.offsetWidth;
                    indicator.classList.remove('no-transition');
                }
            }

            // Initialize indicator on first active tab
            var initialActiveTab = document.querySelector('.flow-tab.active');
            if (initialActiveTab) {
                moveIndicator(initialActiveTab, true);
            }

            // Reposition indicator on resize (tabs may reflow/wrap)
            window.addEventListener('resize', function() {
                var currentActive = document.querySelector('.flow-tab.active');
                if (currentActive) {
                    moveIndicator(currentActive, true);
                }
            });

            flowTabs.forEach(function(tab) {
                tab.addEventListener('click', function() {
                    var flowId = tab.getAttribute('data-flow-id');

                    // Update active tab
                    flowTabs.forEach(function(t) { t.classList.remove('active'); });
                    tab.classList.add('active');

                    // Move the sliding indicator
                    moveIndicator(tab);

                    // Update mobile title
                    var mobileTitle = document.getElementById('flow-tab-mobile-title');
                    if (mobileTitle) {
                        mobileTitle.textContent = tab.getAttribute('data-flow-name') || '';
                    }

                    // Update active content
                    var allContents = document.querySelectorAll('.flow-content');
                    allContents.forEach(function(c) { c.classList.remove('active'); });
                    var activeContent = document.querySelector('[data-flow-content="' + flowId + '"]');
                    if (activeContent) {
                        activeContent.classList.add('active');
                        // Re-observe timeline steps for animations
                        var steps = activeContent.querySelectorAll('.timeline-step');
                        steps.forEach(function(step) {
                            step.classList.remove('in-view');
                        });
                    }

                    window.myop_cta_handler('flow-selected', { flowId: flowId });
                });
            });

        }

        // Word wrap and reveal animation helpers
        function wrapWordsForAnimation(selector) {
            var elements = document.querySelectorAll(selector);
            elements.forEach(function(el) {
                var html = el.innerHTML;
                // Split by <br> first, then wrap words in each segment
                var segments = html.split(/<br\s*\/?>/gi);
                var result = segments.map(function(segment) {
                    var text = segment.replace(/<[^>]*>/g, '').trim();
                    if (!text) return '';
                    var words = text.split(' ');
                    return words.map(function(word) {
                        return '<span class="word">' + word + '</span>';
                    }).join('<span class="word-space"> </span>');
                }).join('<br>');
                el.innerHTML = result;
            });
        }

        function observeAndReveal(selector, delay) {
            var elements = document.querySelectorAll(selector);
            var observer = new IntersectionObserver(function(entries) {
                entries.forEach(function(entry) {
                    if (entry.isIntersecting) {
                        var words = entry.target.querySelectorAll('.word');
                        words.forEach(function(word, index) {
                            setTimeout(function() {
                                word.classList.add('revealed');
                            }, index * (delay || 60));
                        });
                        observer.unobserve(entry.target);
                    }
                });
            }, { threshold: 0.3 });

            elements.forEach(function(el) {
                observer.observe(el);
            });
        }

        function initAnimations() {
            // Section titles
            wrapWordsForAnimation('.how-it-works-title');
            wrapWordsForAnimation('.audience h2');
            wrapWordsForAnimation('.final-cta h2');
            wrapWordsForAnimation('.gallery h2');

            observeAndReveal('.how-it-works-title', 60);

            // Timeline nodes light up on scroll
            var timelineSteps = document.querySelectorAll('.timeline-step');
            var timelineObserver = new IntersectionObserver(function(entries) {
                entries.forEach(function(entry) {
                    if (entry.isIntersecting) {
                        entry.target.classList.add('in-view');
                    }
                });
            }, { threshold: 0.4 });
            timelineSteps.forEach(function(step) {
                timelineObserver.observe(step);
            });
            observeAndReveal('.audience h2', 60);
            observeAndReveal('.final-cta h2', 80);
            observeAndReveal('.gallery h2', 60);

            // Initialize audience parallax
            initAudienceParallax();

            // Initialize CSS 3D Carousel
            initCSSCarousel();
        }

        // ========================================
        // STEP CARD SCROLL TRACKING
        // ========================================
        function initStepCardScroll() {
            var stepCards = document.querySelectorAll('.step-card');
            if (!stepCards.length) return;

            function updateActiveCard() {
                var scrollTop = window.pageYOffset || document.documentElement.scrollTop;
                var viewportHeight = window.innerHeight;
                var triggerPoint = scrollTop + (viewportHeight * 0.4);

                var closestCard = null;
                var closestDistance = Infinity;

                stepCards.forEach(function(card) {
                    var rect = card.getBoundingClientRect();
                    var cardTop = rect.top + scrollTop;
                    var cardCenter = cardTop + (rect.height / 2);
                    var distance = Math.abs(cardCenter - triggerPoint);

                    if (distance < closestDistance) {
                        closestDistance = distance;
                        closestCard = card;
                    }
                });

                // Remove active class from all cards
                stepCards.forEach(function(card) {
                    card.classList.remove('active-scroll');
                });

                // Add active class to closest card
                if (closestCard) {
                    closestCard.classList.add('active-scroll');
                }
            }

            // Update on scroll
            window.addEventListener('scroll', updateActiveCard, { passive: true });

            // Update on resize
            window.addEventListener('resize', updateActiveCard);

            // Initial update
            updateActiveCard();
        }

        // ========================================
        // AUDIENCE PARALLAX
        // ========================================
        function initAudienceParallax() {
            var section = document.querySelector('.audience');
            var cards = document.querySelectorAll('.audience-card');
            if (!section || !cards.length) return;

            // Disable parallax on mobile
            if (window.innerWidth <= 768) {
                cards.forEach(function(card) {
                    card.style.transform = 'translateY(0)';
                });
                return;
            }

            // Parallax speeds: left highest (-), right second highest (-), middle lowest (+)
            // Negative = moves up (higher), Positive = moves down (lower)
            var speeds = [-0.12, 0.1, -0.06];

            function updateParallax() {
                // Check if still not mobile
                if (window.innerWidth <= 768) {
                    cards.forEach(function(card) {
                        card.style.transform = 'translateY(0)';
                    });
                    return;
                }

                var rect = section.getBoundingClientRect();
                var sectionCenter = rect.top + rect.height / 2;
                var viewportCenter = window.innerHeight / 2;
                var distanceFromCenter = sectionCenter - viewportCenter;

                cards.forEach(function(card, index) {
                    var speed = speeds[index % speeds.length];
                    var yOffset = distanceFromCenter * speed;
                    yOffset = Math.max(-150, Math.min(150, yOffset));
                    card.style.transform = 'translateY(' + yOffset + 'px)';
                });

                requestAnimationFrame(updateParallax);
            }

            updateParallax();
        }

        // ========================================
        // CSS 3D CURVED CAROUSEL
        // ========================================
        function initCSSCarousel() {
            var carousel = document.getElementById('gallery-carousel');
            var track = document.getElementById('gallery-track');
            if (!carousel || !track) return;

            // On mobile - use drag-to-scroll instead of 3D carousel
            if (window.innerWidth <= 768) {
                var isDown = false;
                var startX = 0;
                var scrollLeft = 0;

                carousel.addEventListener('mousedown', function(e) {
                    isDown = true;
                    carousel.classList.add('active');
                    startX = e.pageX;
                    scrollLeft = carousel.scrollLeft;
                    carousel.style.cursor = 'grabbing';
                    carousel.style.userSelect = 'none';
                });

                carousel.addEventListener('mouseleave', function() {
                    isDown = false;
                    carousel.classList.remove('active');
                    carousel.style.cursor = 'grab';
                });

                carousel.addEventListener('mouseup', function() {
                    isDown = false;
                    carousel.classList.remove('active');
                    carousel.style.cursor = 'grab';
                });

                carousel.addEventListener('mousemove', function(e) {
                    if (!isDown) return;
                    e.preventDefault();
                    var x = e.pageX;
                    var walk = (x - startX) * 2;
                    carousel.scrollLeft = scrollLeft - walk;
                });

                // Prevent click events on cards when dragging
                var hasMoved = false;
                carousel.addEventListener('mousedown', function() {
                    hasMoved = false;
                });

                carousel.addEventListener('mousemove', function() {
                    if (isDown) hasMoved = true;
                });

                carousel.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                    if (hasMoved) {
                        e.preventDefault();
                        e.stopPropagation();
                    }
                }, true);

                // Touch events for mobile
                carousel.addEventListener('touchstart', function(e) {
                    startX = e.touches[0].pageX;
                    scrollLeft = carousel.scrollLeft;
                }, { passive: true });

                carousel.addEventListener('touchmove', function(e) {
                    var x = e.touches[0].pageX;
                    var walk = (x - startX) * 2;
                    carousel.scrollLeft = scrollLeft - walk;
                }, { passive: true });

                return;
            }

            var cards = track.querySelectorAll('.gallery-card');
            var itemCount = cards.length;
            if (itemCount === 0) return;

            var radius = 900; // Distance from center (increased for more spacing)
            var anglePerItem = 40; // Degrees between items (increased for more separation)
            var currentAngle = 0;
            var targetAngle = 0;
            var isDown = false;
            var startX = 0;
            var startAngle = 0;

            // Total angle for full circle of items
            var totalAngle = itemCount * anglePerItem;

            function positionCards() {
                cards.forEach(function(card, i) {
                    var baseAngle = (i * anglePerItem) + currentAngle;
                    // Wrap angle for infinite scroll
                    var angle = ((baseAngle % totalAngle) + totalAngle) % totalAngle;
                    // Center the visible range
                    if (angle > totalAngle / 2) angle -= totalAngle;

                    var radian = (angle * Math.PI) / 180;

                    var x = Math.sin(radian) * radius;
                    var z = Math.cos(radian) * radius - radius;
                    var rotateY = -angle;

                    // Scale based on depth (closer = slightly larger)
                    var scale = 1 + (z / radius) * 0.15;
                    scale = Math.max(0.85, Math.min(1.15, scale));

                    card.style.transform = 'translateX(' + x + 'px) translateZ(' + z + 'px) rotateY(' + rotateY + 'deg) scale(' + scale + ')';

                    // Set z-index based on depth (closer cards appear on top)
                    card.style.zIndex = Math.round(1000 + z);

                    // Hide cards that are too far behind or to the sides
                    var absAngle = Math.abs(angle);
                    if (z < -radius * 1.2 || absAngle > 80) {
                        card.style.opacity = 0;
                        card.style.pointerEvents = 'none';
                    } else {
                        card.style.opacity = 1;
                        card.style.pointerEvents = 'auto';
                    }
                });
            }

            // Smooth animation
            function animate() {
                currentAngle += (targetAngle - currentAngle) * 0.08;
                positionCards();
                requestAnimationFrame(animate);
            }

            // Event handlers
            function onMouseDown(e) {
                isDown = true;
                startX = e.clientX || e.touches[0].clientX;
                startAngle = targetAngle;
                carousel.style.cursor = 'grabbing';
            }

            function onMouseMove(e) {
                if (!isDown) return;
                var x = e.clientX || (e.touches && e.touches[0].clientX);
                if (x === undefined) return;
                var diff = (startX - x) * 0.3;
                targetAngle = startAngle + diff;
            }

            function onMouseUp() {
                isDown = false;
                carousel.style.cursor = 'grab';
                // Snap to nearest item
                var snapAngle = Math.round(targetAngle / anglePerItem) * anglePerItem;
                targetAngle = snapAngle;
            }

            function onWheel(e) {
                // Only hijack horizontal scroll (Shift + wheel), let vertical scroll through
                if (!e.shiftKey) return;
                e.preventDefault();
                // Scroll speed based on how fast you scroll (deltaY magnitude)
                var scrollSpeed = Math.abs(e.deltaY) * 0.015;
                scrollSpeed = Math.min(scrollSpeed, anglePerItem * 0.5); // Cap max speed
                targetAngle += e.deltaY > 0 ? scrollSpeed : -scrollSpeed;
            }

            // Bind events
            carousel.addEventListener('mousedown', onMouseDown);
            window.addEventListener('mousemove', onMouseMove);
            window.addEventListener('mouseup', onMouseUp);
            carousel.addEventListener('touchstart', onMouseDown);
            window.addEventListener('touchmove', onMouseMove);
            window.addEventListener('touchend', onMouseUp);
            carousel.addEventListener('wheel', onWheel, { passive: false });

            // Initial position and start animation
            positionCards();
            animate();
        }

        function render(data) {
            var container = document.getElementById('app-root');
            container.innerHTML = buildHTML(data);
            attachEventListeners();
            initAnimations();
            initStepCardScroll();
        }

        // Public API
        window.myop_init_interface = function(data) {
            if (!data) {
                return currentData;
            }
            currentData = data;
            render(data);
        };

        window.myop_cta_handler = function(action_id, payload) {
            console.log('[myop_cta_handler]', {
                action: action_id,
                payload: payload,
                timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
            });
        };
    })();
    </script>

    <!-- ========== NAV/FOOTER JAVASCRIPT ========== -->
    <script>
        // ===== Navigation Dropdowns (Products & Resources) =====
        (function() {
            document.getElementById('productsDropdown').addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                if (e.target.closest('.dropdown-rich-item') || e.target.closest('.community-icon-link')) return;
                e.stopPropagation();
                this.classList.toggle('open');
                document.getElementById('resourcesDropdown').classList.remove('open');
            });
            document.getElementById('resourcesDropdown').addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                if (e.target.closest('.dropdown-rich-item') || e.target.closest('.community-icon-link')) return;
                e.stopPropagation();
                this.classList.toggle('open');
                document.getElementById('productsDropdown').classList.remove('open');
            });
            document.getElementById('mobileProductsDropdown').addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                if (e.target.closest('.mobile-rich-item')) return;
                e.stopPropagation();
                this.classList.toggle('open');
                document.getElementById('mobileResourcesDropdown').classList.remove('open');
            });
            document.getElementById('mobileResourcesDropdown').addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                if (e.target.closest('.mobile-rich-item') || e.target.closest('.community-icon-link')) return;
                e.stopPropagation();
                this.classList.toggle('open');
                document.getElementById('mobileProductsDropdown').classList.remove('open');
            });
            document.addEventListener('click', function() {
                document.getElementById('productsDropdown').classList.remove('open');
                document.getElementById('resourcesDropdown').classList.remove('open');
                document.getElementById('mobileProductsDropdown').classList.remove('open');
                document.getElementById('mobileResourcesDropdown').classList.remove('open');
            });

            // Position dropdown panels just below nav
            document.querySelectorAll('.nav-dropdown-panel').forEach(function(panel) {
                panel.style.setProperty('top', '55px', 'important');
            });
        })();

        // ===== Sticky Navigation with Show/Hide on Scroll =====
        (function() {
            const nav = document.getElementById('mainNav');
            let lastScrollTop = 0;
            let scrollThreshold = 5;
            let isNavHidden = false;

            window.addEventListener('scroll', function() {
                const scrollTop = window.pageYOffset || document.documentElement.scrollTop;

                if (Math.abs(scrollTop - lastScrollTop) < scrollThreshold) return;

                if (scrollTop > lastScrollTop && scrollTop > 100) {
                    if (!isNavHidden) {
                        nav.classList.add('nav-hidden');
                        isNavHidden = true;
                    }
                } else if (scrollTop < lastScrollTop) {
                    if (isNavHidden) {
                        nav.classList.remove('nav-hidden');
                        isNavHidden = false;
                    }
                }

                if (scrollTop <= 0) {
                    nav.classList.remove('nav-hidden');
                    isNavHidden = false;
                }

                lastScrollTop = scrollTop;
            }, { passive: true });
        })();
    </script>
</body>

</html>
